title: Rain of Homs
overview: Homs, the hero of the story, its old city wrote the story of Youssef and Yara in their search only for life, nothing but life, during the siege that lasted for a hundred and a few days. They did not choose to stay, did not choose the war, they fled from death so it searched for them.
